raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The CalEITC is a refundable tax credit that provides money back to working low-income families at tax time.",
    "Eligible families failed to claim millions of dollars from the CalEITC because they are unaware the credit exists or do not file a tax return.",
    "For the 2019 tax year, the Franchise Tax Board estimated that 1.25 million eligible taxpayers would not claim the CalEITC.",
    "The CalEITC is considered one of the most effective tools to combat poverty in California.",
    "Senator Caballero believes that vulnerable families in California are in desperate need of financial assistance due to the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "SB 1409 aims to ensure that the EITC reaches more eligible families in the years to come.",
    "SB 1409 is expected to spur local economic activity and make California’s economy more just."
  ]
}
```
